title: Foundations of Distributed Systems
description: Consensus, replication, and failure models — the theory you need before you can reason about real distributed outages.

title: Applied Post-Quantum Cryptography
description: Hands-on migration labs covering lattice-based key exchange and signature schemes for production systems.

title: Explainable AI for Product Teams
description: A practical, non-mathematical introduction to designing trustworthy AI-assisted product experiences.

title: Carbon-Aware Infrastructure Engineering
description: Design and ship a carbon-aware scheduler for real workloads, from a static-threshold MVP to forecast-driven scheduling.

title: Accessibility Engineering: From Audit to Architecture
description: Move accessibility work from a QA checklist into your design tokens, components, and CI pipeline.

title: Site Reliability Engineering in Practice
description: Error budgets, blameless postmortems, and the operational rituals that turn reliability into a shared discipline.
